nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Central configuration module defining a Pydantic Settings class for all runtime parameters.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application entry point exposing REST endpoints for ingestion, querying, listing, and deletion.

nodes.name: orchestrator.py
nodes.summary: Top-level RAG query orchestrator routing queries to vector or SQL retriever with audit logging.

nodes.name: retriever.py
nodes.summary: Full hybrid retrieval pipeline: intent parsing, routing, SQL/vector dispatching, cross-encoder reranking, hallucination grading.

nodes.name: intent_parser.py
nodes.summary: Regex-based parser extracting patient names, providers, dates, ICD codes from plain-English clinical queries.

nodes.name: query_router.py
nodes.summary: Classifies parsed intent as analytical/SQL-lookup/ICD-10/vector-search and attaches routing metadata.

nodes.name: llm_client.py
nodes.summary: Unified LLM invocation dispatching to Ollama or OpenAI based on configuration.

nodes.name: sql_retriever.py
nodes.summary: SQL retrieval: structured entity lookup and LLM text-to-SQL analytical query path.

nodes.name: vectorstore.py
nodes.summary: ChromaDB vector collection with hybrid BM25+dense search and CRUD operations.

nodes.name: ingestion.py
nodes.summary: Core ingestion pipeline processing tabular (CSV/Excel) and unstructured (PDF/TXT/DOCX) files into PostgreSQL and ChromaDB.

nodes.name: audit_logger.py
nodes.summary: HIPAA-oriented audit logging writing structured JSON records of every query event to a rotating log file.

nodes.name: icd9_lookup.py
nodes.summary: Lazy-loaded in-memory ICD-9 diagnosis code lookup table.

nodes.name: schema.py
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL schema initialization, connection management, migration runner, and dynamic staging-table/view system.

nodes.name: operations.py
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL data-access: upsert and fuzzy-match for patients, providers, admissions, clinical records.

nodes.name: catalog_admin.py
nodes.summary: CLI tool for managing the data stream catalog that drives the dynamic SQL query layer.

nodes.name: migrate_sqlite_to_postgres.py
nodes.summary: Database migration from SQLite to PostgreSQL.

nodes.name: purge_structured_chroma.py
nodes.summary: Maintenance script for purging structured documents from ChromaDB.

nodes.name: app.py
nodes.summary: Streamlit chat interface for querying patient records and billing in plain English.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package initializer for backend/rag.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package initializer for backend/db.

layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: FastAPI entry point exposing REST endpoints for clinical querying, ingestion, listing, deletion.

layers.name: RAG Pipeline
layers.description: Core RAG modules: orchestrator, retriever, intent parser, query router, LLM client, deprecated stubs.

layers.name: Data Layer
layers.description: PostgreSQL schema/CRUD, ChromaDB vector store, ingestion pipeline, ICD-9 lookup, SQL retriever, migration scripts, fixture data.

layers.name: Service & Admin Layer
layers.description: HIPAA audit logger and CLI catalog-admin tool.

layers.name: Frontend Layer
layers.description: Streamlit chat UI, its Dockerfile, and dependency manifest.

layers.name: Infrastructure Layer
layers.description: Docker Compose and container build definitions for the 4-service stack.

layers.name: Configuration Layer
layers.description: Pydantic Settings module, .env.example template, tooling config.
